sources.title: Etsy: American 250 Anniversary Gifts / America 250 pages show patriotic commemorative gift demand for 2026.
Etsy: Christian Fourth of July Shirt and 4th of July Christian Shirt pages show faith + patriot apparel demand.
Etsy: Faith Family Freedom Shirt page confirms buyer search intent for the exact phrase cluster.
Etsy: Church Family Day T-shirt / Church Family Shirts pages support church summer event and reunion products.
Etsy: Fathers Day Lake Gifts / Camping Grandpa Gift pages support grandpa, camping, and lake-life gift demand.

top_opportunity.recommended_offer: Launch commemorative America 250 faith/family/freedom shirt and sweatshirt designs with optional family name/year.
risks: Seasonal timing is tight; prioritize fast mockup/sample path.
Verify phrases, patriotic wording, and fonts for trademark/licensing before publishing.
next_actions: Micah creates production-safe art prompt and concept package.
Amanda prepares listing title, tags, description, and pricing review notes.
Manny reviews gallery package before any public listing or customer commitment.
